name: context7 mcp tool-selection matrix
description: Compare README-style and tuned Context7 MCP descriptions for library resolution and documentation query workflows.

instruction_variants.instructions: Choose the single Context7 MCP tool that should be called next. If the user supplies a Context7 library ID in /org/project or /org/project/version format, query docs directly. If the user supplies only a package, product, framework, API, CLI, or cloud service name, resolve the library ID first.
instruction_variants.name: context7_host_rules

tools.name: resolve-library-id
tools.purpose: Resolves a general library name into a Context7-compatible library ID.

tools.name: query-docs
tools.purpose: Retrieves documentation for a library using a Context7-compatible library ID.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the user already supplied a Context7 ID in /org/project or /org/project/version format. In that case use query-docs directly.

libraryName.description: Official library or product name to resolve, for example Next.js, React, Prisma, Supabase, or Customer.io.

query.description: The user's full documentation question, used to rank library results by relevance.

tools.name: resolve-library-id
tools.purpose: Find the exact Context7-compatible library ID before querying documentation.
quality_checks: Use the user's full question as query.
Prefer official sources, strong reputation, high benchmark score, and version-specific IDs when the user names a version.
tools.use_when: Use first when the user gives only a library, framework, SDK, API, CLI, or cloud service name.

tools.avoid_when: Avoid when the user has not supplied or selected an exact Context7 library ID. Resolve the ID first.

libraryId.description: Exact Context7 library ID, for example /vercel/next.js, /mongodb/docs, /supabase/supabase, or /vercel/next.js/v14.3.0-canary.87.

query.description: The user's specific documentation question, not one-word keywords.

tools.name: query-docs
tools.purpose: Fetch current documentation and code examples for a known Context7 library ID.
quality_checks: Call resolve-library-id first unless the user explicitly provided /org/project or /org/project/version.
Use the full user question as query.
Do not call more than 3 times per question.
tools.use_when: Use when a valid Context7 library ID is already available from the user or a previous resolution step.

cases.name: generic library needs resolution
cases.task: Use Context7 to answer: How do I configure middleware matchers in Next.js?

cases.name: well known framework still resolves
cases.task: Use Context7 to fetch current docs for React useEffect cleanup behavior.

cases.name: exact id bypasses resolution
cases.task: Use Context7 docs for /vercel/next.js to answer: how do middleware matchers work?

cases.name: versioned exact id bypasses resolution
cases.task: Use Context7 docs for /vercel/next.js/v14.3.0-canary.87 and show app router route segment config examples.

cases.name: package name with topic resolves first
cases.task: Use Context7 for Prisma transaction isolation examples.

cases.name: previously resolved id queries directly
cases.task: I already resolved Supabase to /supabase/supabase. Use Context7 to fetch auth sign-in with OAuth docs.
